diffCoverage.notes: Dedupe added in the store layer (save_message) and the UI session store; no cross-layer boundary moved.

findings.evidence: The echo-dedup guard lives in the store layer's save_message (rusqlite stays confined to store) and the UI reconciliation lives in the ui session store; both operate on existing DTOs. No layer dependency changed and the fix is symmetric across the persistence + presentation boundaries.

summary: Architecture review: the duplicate fix is applied at the two correct seams — the store layer's save_message (durable dedupe) and the ui session store's appendToBucket (render dedupe) — with no layer-boundary change. Approve.
